lines.speaker: Highlord Katlo
lines.text: Ah, good day to you, human. It's always a pleasure to have the company of your kind in our city.

lines.speaker: Highlord Katlo
lines.text: I'd love to stop and chat with you, but I'm afraid I'm very busy. I have no doubt that you also have plenty of things you need to be doing yourself. Don't let me keep you from them.
